name: dyscalculia-support-skill
description: Comprehensive dyscalculia support system treating dyscalculia as a neurodevelopmental cognitive disorder (not merely a learning disability) with brain-based numerical processing deficits. Implements CRA methodology, cognitive bypass strategies, standards compliance (NCTM, IDEA, Section 504), gap analysis, remediation strategies, and IEP document generation. Grounded in Butterworth core deficit theory and intraparietal sulcus research
author: Justice

skills.name: Standards Compliance
skills.description: Audit educational content against NCTM Principles & Standards, IDEA requirements, and Section 504 accessibility guidelines. Identifies gaps in universal design principles and provides compliance recommendations.

skills.name: Gap Analysis
skills.description: Analyze student mathematical understanding across number sense domains. Identifies specific deficits in concrete-representational-abstract progression and foundational competencies.

skills.name: Remediation Strategies
skills.description: Generate CRA-based remediation plans with concrete manipulatives, representational models, and abstract symbol work. Customizable by student anxiety level, duration, intensity, and comorbidities.

skills.name: Document Generation
skills.description: Create compliant IEP and accommodation documents with specific, measurable goals aligned to mathematics standards and student-centered outcomes.

commands.name: Dyscalculia Audit
commands.description: Run a comprehensive compliance audit on a project/curriculum against NCTM, IDEA, and Section 504 standards. Generates detailed report with specific remediation paths.

parameters.name: project_name
parameters.description: Name of project or curriculum to audit

commands.output: Detailed compliance audit report with checklist, findings, and recommendations

commands.name: Content Accessibility Check
commands.description: Analyze content for dyscalculia accessibility: cognitive load, font/spacing, color contrast, temporal demands, working memory requirements.

parameters.name: content_name
parameters.description: Name or title of content to check

commands.output: Accessibility audit with cognitive load score, specific issues, and remediation strategies

commands.name: Generate IEP
commands.description: Generate a compliant, math-focused IEP document for a student with dyscalculia including present levels, goals, accommodations, and progress monitoring.
commands.output: Compliant IEP document in Markdown with present levels, annual goals, accommodations, and monitoring plan

commands.name: Remediation Plan
commands.description: Create a CRA-based math remediation plan customized by student name, focus area, intensity level, and anxiety profile. Includes concrete/representational/abstract progression.
commands.output: Week-by-week CRA remediation plan with specific activities, materials, and progress monitoring checkpoints
